title: Super Excaliburs
description: Simple Mod thats adds many Excalibur variants
body:
# ⚔️ Super Excaliburs Mod

> *"Only the worthy may wield the sword of legends."*

**Excalibur Mod** brings legendary swords into Minecraft — each forged from myth, magic, and endgame power. Whether you seek the classic blade or its most devastating variants, this mod delivers a truly legendary experience.

---

## 🗡️ Swords

### Excalibur
A powerful mid–late game weapon inspired by Arthurian myth. Crafted for players who want something truly special — this is no ordinary sword.

### ⚡ Lightning Excalibur
Channel the power of storms. The Lightning Excalibur strikes with electric fury, making every blow feel like a bolt from the sky.

### ❄️ Ice Excalibur
Forged from ancient frost, the Ice Excalibur freezes enemies in their tracks. Cold, precise, and deadly.

### 🔥 Netherite Excalibur
For those who seek absolute endgame dominance. The Netherite Excalibur combines the mythical blade with the raw power of the Nether — the ultimate weapon for the ultimate warrior.

---

> ⚠️ **Note:** For **outdated** crafting recipes before version `2.0beta1`, please check the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-excaliburs/gallery).

---

## ✨ Features

- ⚔️ Legendary **Excalibur** sword
- 🔥 **Netherite Excalibur** — ultimate endgame blade
- ⚡ **Lightning Excalibur** — electrifying strikes
- ❄️ **Ice Excalibur** — freezing power
- 🔨 Custom **crafting recipes** for all variants
- Perfect for **exploration**, **boss fights**, and **endgame progression**

---

## 🧪 Dev Builds

Want to try the newest features before everyone else?
👉 **[Check out our dev builds here](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-excaliburs-dev-builds)**
> ⚠️ **Note:** Dev Builds are currently archived

---

## 📦 Mod Versions


| **Fabric** | 1.21.8 |

| **NeoForge** | 1.21.1 |

| **Forge** | 1.20.1 |

---

## 🗺️ Roadmap

Here's what's coming to Super Excaliburs Mod in future updates:

- [ ] 🩸 **Blood Excalibur** — a new deadly variant soaked in battle
- [ ] 🌑 **Void Excalibur** — a blade born from the darkness between worlds
- [ ] 🌟 **XP System** — gain experience and power up your Excalibur
- [ ] 🧪 **Unique special abilities** per sword variant (active effects, passive buffs)
- [ ] ⚖️ **Damage Balance Update** — fine-tuning all swords for fair and satisfying gameplay
- [ ] 🌍 **Fabric** — 1.20.1 support
- [ ] 🔨 **Forge** — 1.19.4, 1.19.2, 1.18.2, 1.17.1, 1.16.5 support
- [ ] 🔩 **NeoForge** — 1.21.4, 1.20.6, 1.20.4 support

> 🎮 **Some upcoming features can already be tested in Creative Mode** — however, textures are subject to change and **may look different** in the final release.


---

## 🌍 Translations

The mod language is available in the following languages:

- 🇬🇧 English
- 🇵🇱 Polish (Polski)
- 🇩🇪 German (Deutsch)
- 🇮🇹 Italian (Italiano)
- 🇫🇷 French (Français)
- 🇨🇿 Czech (Čeština)
- 🇸🇰 Slovak (Slovenčina)
- 🇪🇸 Spanish (Español)
- 🇸🇪 Swedish (Svenska)

> ⚠️ **Note:** All translations (except English) were translated using **DeepL** and may not be 100% accurate.

---

## 📜 Disclaimer

This mod is **not** a copy of the Polish server *anarchia.gg*. It is an original inspiration and expansion of the weapon concept. All textures were inspired by and created by the **Owca Dev Team**.
